Patch Set 1:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 1 on the queue.

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab Orange 3: Chained-CI build starting error. Status code: 500, failure message: 500 Internal Server Error

Patch Set 1: Verified-1

Build Failed 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-image-verify/1454/ : FAILURE

Unreleased image detected. Only released images are allowed in oom helm charts. ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-image-verify/1454/ )

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/oom-master-image-verify/1454

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/900/ : FAILURE

It seems that you don"t have a commit body.

You must add at least one sentence explaining the purpose of the commit ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/900/ )

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/900/ )

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/oom-master-commit-lint/900

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-verify-helm3.5/349/ : SUCCESS

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/oom-master-verify-helm3.5/349

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-verify-helm3.3/350/ : SUCCESS

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/oom-master-verify-helm3.3/350

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

the commit message (on OOM) must follow this form:

[NAME_OF_COMPONENT|DOC|COMMON|GENERIC] Meaningful title (from OOM side)

at least one sentence explaining the change done in this patch, cause and consequences and possibly more of course

Issue-ID: AS_WE_ARE_FORCED_BUT_MEANINGLESS
Change-ID: xxx
Sign-off: xxx

Commit message will be the last stuff that will stay with our code so it must clearly explain the changes, the "why" and the consequences. If it change OOM behavior in any way, documentation must be also updated.

Starting Frankfurt branching, merge requests which are not following this pattern will not be merged.

Please read the following pages and follow the guidelines for writing commit message contained therein.

    http://bit.ly/goodcommitmessages
    http://who-t.blogspot.com/2009/12/on-commit-messages.html
    http://dep.debian.net/deps/dep3/

Patch Set 1:

you also need a requirements.yaml
as we've passed M3, this won't be merged before branching Honolulu branch and it'll be merged for Istanbul release

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-2

We have a little bit duplicated changes please keep only one and drop another one

this should be squashed with the commit above. Please do it ASAP
